name: Problem-Solution
description: Classic pain point to solution flow. Hook with relatable frustration, agitate, introduce product as answer, prove with features/results, close with CTA.

scenes.description: Attention-grabbing visual or question that resonates with the target pain point
scenes.footage_hint: Close-up of frustrating moment or relatable scenario

scenes.description: Show the problem in action -- make it visceral and relatable
scenes.footage_hint: Real footage of the problem (messy, frustrating, uncomfortable)

scenes.description: Amplify the emotional weight of the problem
scenes.footage_hint: Continued problem footage or reaction shot

scenes.description: Introduce the product as the answer -- show the transformation
scenes.footage_hint: Product reveal, installation, or first use

scenes.description: Showcase key features, close-ups, or results
scenes.footage_hint: Product close-ups, texture, quality details, before/after

scenes.description: Clear call-to-action with urgency or value proposition
scenes.footage_hint: Product beauty shot or lifestyle scene with text overlay
